title: 01046_Hiera_A_Hierarchical_Vision_Transformer_without_the_Bells-and-Whistles
positive_examples: Hiera is significantly faster both at inference and during training, which can lead to reduced energy consumption in computational tasks.
Hiera outperforms state-of-the-art models on various image and video recognition tasks, potentially improving the efficiency of applications in fields like healthcare and security.
The simplicity of Hiera allows for easier deployment in real-world applications, making advanced vision transformer technology more accessible.
